examples.title: Two-Phase Commit Protocol
examples.description: Coordinator logic for distributed transaction commit
examples.code:
PROCEDURE TwoPhaseCommit()
BEGIN
  SEND PREPARE TO ALL PARTICIPANTS
  IF ALL VOTE_YES THEN
    SEND COMMIT
  ELSE
    SEND ROLLBACK
  ENDIF
END
examples.explanation: Coordinator first collects votes, then decides final commit/abort
